login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your leadership journey

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start your leadership development journey
register.successMessage: We've sent a verification link to your email address.

consent.title: Terms and Agreements
consent.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service
consent.privacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy
consent.dataProcessing: I consent to the processing of my personal data as described in the Privacy Policy
consent.marketing: I'd like to receive product updates and leadership tips (optional)

verifyPending.title: Check your email
verifyPending.message: We've sent a verification link to
verifyPending.instructions: Click the link in the email to verify your account. The link expires in 24 hours.

verifySuccess.title: Email verified!
verifySuccess.message: Your account has been verified successfully. You can now sign in and start your leadership journey.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in to your account.
verifyEmail.resentMessage: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
verifyEmail.pendingMessage: We've sent a verification link to
verifyEmail.errorMessage: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.success: If this email is registered, we've sent password reset instructions.

resetPassword.title: Create new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account
resetPassword.invalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

resetSuccess.title: Password reset!
resetSuccess.message: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
